        25 About                                                       Static Content        <p>The release dashboard provides a distribution of data by priority, size, and owner.  Use this dashboard to track release progress.<p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                             <strong>Column Descriptions</strong>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                             <ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                             <li><strong>Priority</strong>: P1 through P5 with P1 most important</li>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                             <li><strong>&NOMENCLATURE_PROJECT. Count</strong>>: Number of projects associated with the release that correspond to the grouping.</li>                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                             </ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                             <ul>

                                                                                             begin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                 --                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                 -- count existing links                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                 --                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                 for c1 in (select count(*) c from sp_project_links where project_id = :P31_ID ) loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                     l_existing_links := c1.c;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
        33 Menubar                                                                           select 1 as actions from dual                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
        33 Comments Report                                             Report                select ic.ID,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                    -- Display Columns                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    tm.initials user_icon,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                    to_char(ic.created,'fmDay, fmDD fmMonth, YYYY') date_full,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                    null comment_date,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    tm.first_name || ' ' || tm.last_name user_name,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                    --

                                                                                                ) loop

        42 No Preview Available                                        Static Content        This file type cannot be previewed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
        42 SQL                                                         Dynamic Content       declare                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                s clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                l number;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                r clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                l_offset int := 1;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                             begin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                for c1 in (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                    select TO_CLOB(DOCUMENT_BLOB) x                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                    from SP_RELEASE_DOCUMENTS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                    where id = :P42_ID) loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                       s := c1.x;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                end loop;

        43 SQL                                                         Report                select 'insert into SP_COUNTRIES (ID, COUNTRY_CODE, COUNTRY_NAME, REGION, DISPLAY_YN, QUICK_PICK_YN, LAT, LON, COUNTRY_CODE3) values ('||                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                   id||', '''||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                   COUNTRY_CODE||''', '''||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                   replace(COUNTRY_NAME,'''','''''')||''', '''||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                   REGION||''', '''||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                   DISPLAY_YN||''', '''||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                   QUICK_PICK_YN||''', '||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                   nvl(to_char(LAT),'null')||', '||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                   nvl(to_char(LON),'null')||', '''||                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                   COUNTRY_CODE3||''');' SQL                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                               from SP_COUNTRIES

        55 Release                                                     Report                select r.ID,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                    r.RELEASE_TRAIN||' '||r.RELEASE release,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                    decode(r.RELEASE_TARGET_DATE,null,    'No Date',to_char(r.RELEASE_TARGET_DATE,   'DD-MON-YY')) RELEASE_TARGET_DATE,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                    decode(r.RELEASE_OPEN_DATE,null,      'No Date',to_char(r.RELEASE_OPEN_DATE,     'DD-MON-YY')) RELEASE_OPEN_DATE,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                    greatest(round(r.RELEASE_TARGET_DATE - sysdate),0) days_remaining,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    --                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    -- projects                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                    --                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    (select count(*)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                       from sp_projects p                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                      where p.release_id

        57 Search Results                                              Report                select h.CHANGED_ON             ATTRIBUTE_CHANGE_DATE,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                    to_char(h.CHANGED_ON,'YYYY.MM') ATTRIBUTE_CHANGE_Month,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                    case h.change_type when 'CREATE' then 'Added'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                     when 'UPDATE' then 'Updated'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                     when 'DELETE' then 'Deleted'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                     else change_type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                         end change_type,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                    --                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    initcap(replace(h.attribute_column,'_',' ')) ATTRIBUTE_COLUMN,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                    decode(h.old_value,'Y','Yes','N','No',h.old_value) OLD_VALUE,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
        57 details                                                     Report                select f.area,

        60 Images                                                      Cards                 select d.ID,

                                                                                                                 then first_name||' '||last_name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                 else email                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                 end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                            from sp_team_members t where t.id = r.owner_id)

        62 details                                                     Report                select f.area focus_area,

                                                                                                    --                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    (select first_name||' '||last_name                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                     from sp_team_members tm                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                     where tm.id = i.SPONSOR_ID) the_owner,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                    --                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    i.sponsor_id owner_id,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                    --                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                    i.updated,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                    --

                                                                                                    dbms_lob.getlength(i.image) as image,

                                                                                                    i.image_mimetype,

                                                                                                    SP_AREAS f                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                             where i.area_id = f.id and

        63 Milestones                                                  Report                with r as (

                                                                                                    milestone_description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                               from sp_release_milestones, r                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                              where release_id = :P63_COPY_FROM_RELEASE_ID                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                              order by milestone_date asc

        73 Active Approvals                                            Report                select p.project, p.friendly_identifier,

                                                                                                    case when a.submitted_by_team_member_id = :APP_USER_ID

                                                                                                                            else initcap(replace(status,'-',' '))                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                            end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                  from (select status,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                               updated,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                               max(updated) over (partition by team_member

        88 Tags                                                        Report                  with rws as (

                                                                                               where id = :P88_PROJECT_ID and tags is not null                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                             )                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                               select action, trim(tag) tag from (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                               select null action,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                     regexp_substr (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                        str,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                        '[^,]+',                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                        1,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                        level                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                      ) tag                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                               from   rws                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                               connect by level <=                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                 length ( str ) - length ( replace ( str, ',' ) ) + 1) x                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                               order by tag

                                                                                             This &NOMENCLATURE_PROJECT. organization is just one way to filter or categorize &NOMENCLATURE_PROJECTS..                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                             &NOMENCLATURE_PROJECTS. can also be filtered by tags and releases.

       107 About                                                       Static Content        <p>

       117 &NOMENCLATURE_PROJECTS.                                     Interactive Report    select p.ID,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                    p.PROJECT,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                    (select FIRST_NAME ||' '||last_name from SP_TEAM_MEMBERS x where x.ID = p.OWNER_ID) the_owner,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                    (select 'P'||PRIORITY from SP_PROJECT_PRIORITIES x where x.ID = p.PRIORITY_ID) priority,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                    p.PCT_COMPLETE pct_complete,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                    case when p.pct_complete >= s.min_pc_for_status                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                          and p.pct_complete != 100                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                         then nvl((select status from sp_project_statuses                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                    where id = p.status_id),'Not Set')                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                         else 'NA'

       145 About                                                       Static Content        <p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                             A group is a collection of users who are working together.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                             Using groups allow filtering of &NOMENCLATURE_PROJECTS. for only those owned by a member of the group. Each group can also be associated with a tag.  This allows filtering of &NOMENCLATURE_PROJECTS. associated with the "Group Tag".                                                                                                                           
                                                                                             </p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                             <p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                             A user can be part of more then one group.  You can also use the groups capability to identify a virtual team.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                             </p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                             </p>

       175 The following &NOMENCLATURE_INITIATIVE. will be created     Dynamic Content       declare                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                l_clob            clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                l_status_scale    varchar2(60);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                l_default_tasks   number;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                l_focus_areas     number;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                             begin

                                                                                                   from sp_project_scales                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                  where scale_letter = :P171_STATUS_SCALE;

                                                                                                   into l_default_tasks

       502 Details                                                     Dynamic Content       declare                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                 x clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                             begin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                             x := 'No details provided.';                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                             for c1 in (select description from sp_tasks d where d.id = :P502_TASK_ID and description is not null) loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                 x := apex_markdown.to_html(c1.description);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                             end loop;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                             return x;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                             end;

       505 SQL                                                         Dynamic Content       declare                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                s clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                l number;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                r clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                l_offset int := 1;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                             begin

     10000 ACL Information                                             PL/SQL                declare                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                 l_acl_scope varchar2(45);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                             begin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                 l_acl_scope := apex_app_setting.get_value( p_name => 'ACCESS_CONTROL_SCOPE' );                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                 if l_acl_scope = 'ALL_USERS' then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                     sys.htp.p( apex_lang.message('APEX.FEATURE.ACL.INFO.ALL_USERS') );                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                 elsif l_acl_scope = 'ACL_ONLY' then                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                     sys.htp.p( apex_lang.message('APEX.FEATURE.ACL.INFO.ACL_ONLY') );                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                 else                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                     sys.htp.p( apex_lang.message('APEX.FEATURE.ACL.INFO.ACL_VALUE_INVALID', l_acl_scope) );                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                 end if;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                             end;
