     10820 About this Application                                      Dynamic Content       declare                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                 x clob;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                             begin                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                             x := 'No content provided.';                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                             for c1 in (select configurable_content from SP_CONFIGURABLE_TEXT where config_ID = 'ABOUT-PRIMARY-TEXT') loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                 x := c1.configurable_content;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                 x := apex_application.do_substitutions(x);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                 x := replace(x,'NOMENCLATURE_PROJECTS','hello');                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                 x := apex_markdown.to_html(x);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                             end loop;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                             return x;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                             end;

     10820 Percent Complete                                            Static Content        <p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                             Each &NOMENCLATURE_PROJECT. has a percent complete attribute.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                             This percent complete status specifies a percent complete ranging from 0% to 100% in 10% increments.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                             Each &NOMENCLATURE_PROJECT. can choose a scale from a list of scales, the default is set by the selected &NOMENCLATURE_INITIATIVE..                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                             The scale identifies the meaning of what is 10% complete and what is 20% complete etc, in addition to what milestones will be tracked based on the type.

     12140 Configure External Person Link                              Static Content        If both a link and domain are provided, a link of "External Directory" will display on the detailed person pages whenever a person's email address is within the specified domain.      14010 Delete Sample Data                                          Report                select label, cnt, details

                                                                                             (

                                                                                               from SP_AREAS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                              where id in (1,2)

                                                                                             select 2 ob, :NOMENCLATURE_INITIATIVES label, count(*) cnt,

                                                                                               from SP_INITIATIVES                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                              where id in (1,2,3)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                             union all                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                             select 3 ob, :NOMENCLATURE_PROJECTS label, count(*) cnt,

                                                                                                    case when opted_in_yn = 'Y' then 'Yes' else 'No' end opted_in_for_filter,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                    (s                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
     16016 Subscriptions                                               Report                select ns.ID,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                    apex_escape.html(n.name || case when r.id is not null then ' for '|| r.release_train ||' '|| r.release end) ||apex_item.hidden(1,n.id) notification,                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                    ns.NOTIFICATION_ID,
